rationale: Both evaluations land on the same 6/10 score and the same core assessment: strong full-stack/distributed-systems experience but no explicit evidence of experimentation/feature-flagging platforms, telemetry, or AI-driven growth tooling at scale. The wording differs (language list reordered, GISCollective/Fluent-Asserts cited, an IC6 leadership note added), but none of these shifts references or keys off the candidate's location. The 'cross-team technical leadership at IC6 level' concern is a normal rewording of role-fit reasoning, not a location-driven penalty, and the changes are within ordinary run-to-run noise.
